info.name: Borg UI API
info.description: Postman collection for the Borg UI backend API. This collection is organized from the current FastAPI route inventory as of 2026-05-28 and includes one request for each canonical available API route. Requests inherit the collection-level `X-Borg-Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}` header unless marked no-auth. Run the Login request first to populate `access_token`.

request.description:
Authenticate and save the returned JWT to `access_token`.

Backend route: `POST /api/auth/login`

Source: `app/api/auth.py:746`

item.name: List Backup Plan Runs For Plan
